title: cyperus dactylotes
intro: Cyperus dactylotes, also known as the Marsh club-rush, is a type of sedge that belongs to the Cyperaceae family of plants. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Cyperus dactylotes include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
